title: General Tagge (disambiguation)
content:
There were at least two [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[General/Legends|generals]] in the [[House of Tagge/Legends|Tagge family]]:

*[[Cassio Tagge/Legends|Cassio Tagge]], famed officer who was part of [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star I's]] command triumvirate.
**[[Cassio Tagge|His Canon counterpart]], member of the [[House of Tagge]], [[Joint Chiefs|Joint Chief]], [[Chief of the Imperial Army]], and [[Grand General]].
*[[Ulric Tagge/Legends|Ulric Tagge]], younger brother of [[Orman Tagge/Legends|Orman Tagge]] and eventual [[Baron/Legends|Baron]] of the Tagge family.

{{Disambig}}
